question: An Assistant Instructor must not:

options.c: Independently conduct open water training dives for entry-level scuba training

explanation: All three are restricted for AIs.

question: An Instructor Trainer may _____ an Instructor Certifier in conducting all SSI Instructor Evaluation programs.
explanation: IT assists Instructor Certifier in IE programs.

question: What is the recommended duration for completing the Instructor Training Course?
explanation: ITC recommended duration: 70–80 hours.

question: What is the maximum depth for in-water training during the Instructor Training Course?
explanation: ITC in-water training max depth: 40 m.

question: Which of the following is a prerequisite for Divemaster Instructor?

options.a: SSI Open Water Instructor or equivalent
options.c: ISO 24802-2 instructor from any training agency
options.d: Instructor from a recognized training agency

explanation: DM Instructor requires SSI OWI specifically (not equivalents).

question: An Open Water Instructor candidate must have logged at least ____ open water dives before attending an Instructor Evaluation?
explanation: OWI requires 100 logged OW dives prior to IE.

question: What is the active status requirements for an Assistant Instructor Trainer?

options.a: Certify at least one Assistant Instructor every twelve (12) months
options.b: Attend all applicable mandatory updates scheduled by SSI International
options.c: Certify at least one professional certification every twelve (12) month
options.d: There are no active status requirements for Assistant Instructor Trainer

explanation: Active AIT must attend all applicable mandatory SSI International updates.

question: The intent of the Assistant Instructor program is to prepare candidates to:

options.a: Conduct Open Water specialty programs without supervision
options.b: Perform the duties of an Assistant Instructor
options.d: Conduct entry-level scuba programs without supervision

explanation: AI program prepares candidates to perform AI duties.

question: What specialty instructor certifications must a Divemaster Instructor have?

options.b: Diver Stress & Rescue and Deep Diving

explanation: All three (Stress & Rescue + Deep + Dive Guide/Nav + Night) are required.

question: Which of the following is a prerequisite for Master Instructor?

options.d: Have issued at least 150 recreational scuba certifications

explanation: All three are MI prerequisites.

question: An active status Assistant Instructor may:

options.a: Teach the Open Water Diver academic without supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.b: Teach the Open Water Diver academic, pool/confined water sessions and open water training dives under the indirect supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.c: Teach the Open Water Diver academic and pool/confined water sessions under the indirect supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.d: Teach the Open Water Diver academic and pool/confined water sessions without supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor

explanation: AI teaches OW academic + pool sessions under indirect OWI supervision (NOT OW dives).

question: What must professionals from other training agencies do to qualify as an SSI Open Water Instructor?

options.a: Complete all digital learning, reviews, and assessments from the Instructor Training Course
options.b: Pass the Instructor Training Course final exam
options.c: Complete all required academic sessions from the Instructor Training Course

explanation: All three steps are required for cross-agency OWI conversion.

question: Assistant Instructor Trainer candidates must have issued at least:

options.a: 50 certifications (30 Open Water Diver, 15 Advanced Open Water Diver and/or additional specialty programs, 3 Diver Stress & Rescue, 2 Dive Guide/Divemaster)
options.c: 51 certifications (30 Open Water Diver, 15 Specialty programs, 6 Diver Stress and Rescue)

explanation: AIT cert breakdown: 30 OW + 15 AOWD/spec + 3 Stress & Rescue + 2 DG/DM = 50.

question: Which of the following is an emergency ascent skill?
explanation: Emergency Buoyant Ascent is the emergency ascent skill.

question: An Assistant Instructor must have _____ logged dives prior to certification.
explanation: AI requires 75 logged dives.

question: An active status Divemaster Instructor may:

options.a: Enroll in an Instructor Trainer Seminar
options.b: Enroll in an Assistant Instructor program
options.d: Enroll in an Assistant Instructor Trainer Seminar

explanation: Active DM Instructor may enroll in the AIT Seminar.

question: The intent of the Instructor Training Course?

options.b: To provide the knowledge necessary to conduct entry-level recreational scuba training programs
options.c: To provide the training necessary to organize and conduct specialty programs
options.d: To provide the knowledge necessary to organize entry-level recreational scuba training programs

explanation: ITC provides knowledge + training to organize/conduct entry-level scuba — all aspects apply.

question: Who must directly supervise all activities for the Instructor Training Course?

options.c: An active status Assistant Instructor Trainer under the direct supervision of an active status Instructor Trainer

explanation: Active Instructor Trainer directly supervises ITC.

question: What is a prerequisite for the Instructor Training Course?
explanation: DM is the prerequisite for ITC.

question: What is the maximum depth for emergency ascent skills in the open water environment?
explanation: Emergency ascent skills are capped at 9 m / 30 ft.

question: The minimum instructor certification to teach the Scuba Skills Update program is:
explanation: AI is the minimum cert to teach Scuba Skills Update.

question: An Assistant Instructor can _____ the Perfect Buoyancy specialty program.

options.d: Indirectly supervise and issue recognition cards for

explanation: AI may teach AND issue certifications for Perfect Buoyancy.

question: Assistant Instructors may teach which programs?

options.b: Try Scuba and Scuba Skills Update
options.c: Open Water Diver and Basic Diver

explanation: AI may teach Try Scuba and Scuba Skills Update.

question: The Instructor Evaluation must be conducted within ______ months of the completion of the Instructor Training Course.
explanation: IE within 6 months of ITC completion.

question: Regarding supervision, what may an active status Assistant Instructor do?

options.a: Indirectly supervise and evaluate surface skills during open water training dives for the Open Water Diver program under the direct supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.b: Directly supervise and evaluate surface skills during open water training dives for the Open Water Diver program under the indirect supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.c: Directly supervise and evaluate all skills during open water training dives for the Open Water Diver program under the indirect supervision of an active status Open Water Instructor
options.d: Directly supervise all skills during pool/confined water sessions for the Open Water Diver program

explanation: AI directly supervises and evaluates surface skills on OW dives, under indirect OWI supervision.

question: A candidate must hold his _____ certification for at least ____ months prior to start the Instructor Training Course
explanation: Hold DM for 6 months before starting ITC.

question: Which of the following is a prerequisite for registering for the Instructor Training Course?

options.d: Navigation, Deep Diving and Night & Limited Visibility

explanation: Specialty trio (Nav + Deep + Night/Limited Vis) is required for ITC.

question: Candidate(s) for an Instructor Evaluation must be registered in MySSI at least _____ weeks prior to the scheduled Instructor Evaluation start date.
explanation: MySSI registration at least 6 weeks before IE start.

question: What is the in-water ratio for the Assistant Instructor Training Course?
explanation: AITC has no fixed in-water ratio.

question: What specialty instructor certifications can an Assistant Instructor qualify for?

options.c: Perfect Buoyancy and Advanced Wreck Diving

explanation: AI qualifies for Boat Diving and Navigation specialty instructor.

question: To become a Divemaster, the candidate must complete the requirements for maintaining active status:

options.a: With the responsible SSI Training Center
options.b: With the responsible SSI Service Center
options.d: With SSI as outlined in the General Training Standards

explanation: Per General Training Standards.

question: A Divemaster can:

options.a: Qualify as a Specialty Instructor for all Diving Knowledge specialty programs
options.b: Take up to three (3) students at a time on excursion dives
options.d: Enroll in an SSI Instructor Training Course

explanation: DM can enroll in ITC.

question: How can an Assistant Instructor qualify to teach the SSI Explorer program?

options.a: This certification is given automatically with the Assistant Instructor certification
options.b: Completing the SSI Explorer Instructor Online Upgrade
options.d: This certification is given automatically with the Divemaster certification

explanation: Online Upgrade is the path.

question: What are the requirements for completing the Instructor Training Course?

options.a: Read and complete all sections, including reviews and assessments, from the Instructor Training Course digital learning
options.c: Complete all academic sessions, requirements and evaluations as outlined in the instructor manual for the Instructor Training Course
options.d: Complete and pass the Instructor Training Course final exam

explanation: All three required.

question: To qualify as a Master Instructor the candidate may apply completed Try Scuba, programs toward the minimum requirements for Open Water Diver certifications.

options.a: Six (6) Try Scuba recognitions are equivalent to one (1) Open Water Diver certification
options.b: Two (2) Try Scuba recognitions are equivalent to one (1) Open Water Diver certification
options.c: Twelve (12) Try Scuba recognitions are equivalent to one (1) Open Water Diver certification
options.d: Five (5) Basic Diver certifications are equivalent to one (1) Open Water Diver certification

explanation: 12 Try Scuba = 1 OW for MI minimums.

question: What is the minimum instructor rating to conduct the Assistant Instructor Training Course?
explanation: AIT (Assistant Instructor Trainer) is the minimum.

question: A Divemaster is a:

options.a: Professional who may teach Diving Knowledge specialty programs
options.b: Professional who can teach entry-level students

explanation: DM is a certified assistant role.

question: The Divemaster card is a(an):
explanation: DM card is the entry-level Pro certification card.

question: How many logged open water dives are required to start the Instructor Training Course?
explanation: 60 dives + 40 hours.

question: Which of the following is a prerequisite for registering for the Instructor Training Course?

options.b: Specialty Instructor in Navigation, Deep Diving, and Night & Limited Visibility

explanation: DM is the prerequisite.

question: A Divemaster candidate must have _____ logged dives prior to certification.
explanation: DM = 60 logged dives.

question: The Candidate Water Fitness Evaluation is valid for:
explanation: Validity = 6 months.

question: The Divemaster Instructor card is a(an):
explanation: DM Instructor = Pro certification.

question: Before beginning training, how can professionals from other training agencies earn an equivalent SSI Professional certification?

options.a: Complete an SSI training course from the beginning, regardless of prior certification
options.c: Verify certification equivalency, register for the certification, purchase required materials, and upload necessary documents to MySSI
options.d: Purchase the required materials without registering or uploading documents

explanation: Verify equivalency, register, purchase, upload to MySSI.

question: What is the minimum depth for open water training during the Instructor Training Course?
explanation: ITC OW training min depth = 5 m.

question: What is the minimum number of certifications required from any recreational scuba program to qualify as a Master Instructor?
explanation: MI minimum = 150 recreational certs.

question: Who must directly supervise all academic sessions and in-water activities during the Assistant Instructor Training Course?

options.b: An active status Instructor Trainer or higher
options.c: An active status Assistant Instructor Trainer
options.d: An active status Assistant Instructor Trainer can indirectly supervise all academic sessions, but must direct supervise all in-water activities

explanation: Active AIT directly supervises AITC academics + in-water.

question: An active status Assistant Instructor Trainer may teach, supervise and issue certifications for the following programs:

options.d: Specialty Instructor Seminar (if they have the applicable Specialty Instructor certification)

explanation: AIT can teach ITC, AIT seminars, and Specialty Instructor Seminars (with applicable cert).

question: What parts of the Instructor Training Course must be completed by Assistant Instructor candidates?

options.a: Academic Sections 1-5, the final exam, and Practical Applications 1-6
options.b: Academic Sections 1-7, the final exam, and Practical Applications 1-6
options.c: Academic Sections 1-5, the final exam, and Practical Applications 1-5
options.d: Academic Sections 1-6, the final exam, and Practical Applications 1-4

explanation: Sections 1-6 + final exam + PA 1-4.

question: Is the SSI Divemaster certification ISO-certified?
explanation: DM is ISO-certified.
